allow: Bash(awk '{costs[NR]=$1; total[NR]=$5} END {n=length\(costs\); printf "Treatment_Cost: min=$%.0f, median=$%.0f, max=$%.0f\\n", costs[1], costs[int\(n/2\)], costs[n]; printf "Total_Cost: min=$%.0f, median=$%.0f, max=$%.0f\\n", total[1], total[int\(n/2\)], total[n]}')
Bash(awk -F, 'NR==1{for\(i=1;i<=NF;i++\) print i": "$i} NR>1{for\(i=10;i<=14;i++\) costs[$i]++} END{}' /Users/raghavyadav/Desktop/medical_cost-main/dataset.csv)
